subcodes.first_line: O My Glorious One! All existence is for the triumph of God's Cause, which is the exaltation of His Word amidst His servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مجید ما کل از برای نصره الله که ارتفاع کلمه او است مابین عباد بوجود
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
